user_prompt: Prepare the transit mag-rail for startup
prayer:
Approach the transit mag-rail with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the mag-rail conduits with sacred oils, invoking the startup rites of acceleration.
Chant the Litany of Momentum whilst aligning the transit mag-rail's flux fields.
Initiate the startup sequence, verifying the transit mag-rail's harmonious purr.
Sanctify the awakened coils in the name of the Machine God.

Kneel before the photolenses, invoking the Omnissiah's gaze upon their crystalline hearts.
Initiate diagnostics upon the photolenses, purging distortions from their optic arrays.
Recite the Canticle of Clarity as binary spirits within the photolenses realign.
Scan for aberrations in the photolenses' focusing mechanisms with auspex precision.
Conclude diagnostics, affirming the photolenses' purity to the Machine Spirits.

Grasp the chainsword hilt with mechadendrite-clad hands, awakening its ravenous Machine Spirit.
Anoint the chainsword teeth with blessed lubricants for the startup invocation.
Chant the Hymn of Shredding whilst engaging the startup motor sequence.
Test the chainsword's revolutions, ensuring predatory harmony in its whir.
Praise the Omnissiah as the chainsword sings its lethal canticle.
